g.text: Comparison of Parallel Feature Extraction Architectures
B: Batch | S: Seq | D: Dim
H: Height | W: Width | C: Chan

div.p: The Core Insight: Both architectures solve the "multi-feature" problem by running multiple independent detectors in parallel. The transformer "Head" is functionally equivalent to the CNN "Filter" as a specialized pattern extractor.
